name: Easy Double Chocolate Banana Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt in a large bowl.
3. Make a well in the center of the ingredients.
4. Add milk, mashed ripe banana, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
5. Beat with a fork until well blended, about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in chocolate chips.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square cake pan.
8. Bake in the preheated oven at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until done.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
